name: Explain Chosen Action Path
description: Require explicit explanation of why an action path was selected and what alternatives were considered.
prompt: Explain your chosen action path for opening Add or Remove Programs. Include why the path was chosen, one alternative path, and one safety constraint.
success_definition: Model provides concise rationale and exposes selected workflow/tool choice with safety constraints.

required_context.value: Always include selected path, one alternative, and one safety boundary.

optional_context.query: How do I open Add or Remove Programs in Windows settings?
